snap-memory.instructions: Real-time error learning system. Use BEFORE risky operations: mcp__snap-memory__get_snap_tips('video rendering'). AFTER fixing errors: mcp__snap-memory__record_solution(). Thompson Sampling balances proven solutions (85%) with experiments (15%). 4 tools: get_snap_tips, record_error, record_solution, search_learnings.

genius-orchestrator.instructions: Genius Orchestrator with 79 tools: mission planning, agent routing, snap memory, session intelligence. Use search_genius_tools() to discover tools. Primary orchestration hub.
